_meta.description: Verification policy requiring range summary, row counts, missing-data policy, and reproducible audit fields for every Excel calc agent computation.

requiredFields.description: UUID for this computation run
Recipe ID that was executed
ISO 8601 timestamp of execution
Python runtime version
Dict of package name to version used
Random seed used, null if deterministic
Wall-clock execution time in ms
SHA-256 hash of input data for reproducibility
SHA-256 hash of output data

optionalFields.description: Whether the result was served from cache
Retry number if computation was retried
Parent computation ID for chained operations

rangeSummary.description: Required summary statistics that must accompany every computation result for input data characterization.

requiredFields.description: Total number of data rows (excluding header)
Total number of columns in the input range
Number of columns with numeric dtype (int, float)
Number of columns with categorical or string dtype
Number of columns with datetime dtype
Total number of null/NaN/empty cells across all columns
Percentage of all cells that are missing (0.0 to 100.0)
Global minimum across all numeric columns, null if no numeric columns
Global maximum across all numeric columns, null if no numeric columns
Grand mean across all numeric columns, null if no numeric columns
Pooled standard deviation across all numeric columns, null if no numeric columns
Number of fully duplicated rows

perColumnSummary.description: Per-column summary object required for each column in the input range.

requiredFields.description: Most frequent value
Frequency of the most frequent value

missingDataPolicy.description: Policy rules governing how the agent must handle missing (null/NaN/empty) data in input ranges.

message.en: Cannot compute: all cells in the selected range are empty or missing.
message.pt: Impossivel calcular: todas as celulas no intervalo selecionado estao vazias ou ausentes.

message.en: Cannot compute: column '{{columnName}}' is entirely empty.
message.pt: Impossivel calcular: a coluna '{{columnName}}' esta inteiramente vazia.

message.en: More than 50% of cells are missing ({{missingCellPercentage}}%). Proceed with available data or cancel?
message.pt: Mais de 50% das celulas estao ausentes ({{missingCellPercentage}}%). Prosseguir com os dados disponiveis ou cancelar?

message.en: Column '{{columnName}}' is {{nullPercentage}}% missing and will be excluded from computation.
message.pt: A coluna '{{columnName}}' tem {{nullPercentage}}% de dados ausentes e sera excluida do calculo.

rules.condition: numeric column nullCount > 0 AND method in [mean, median, std, variance, correlation, regression]

message.en: Dropping {{nullCount}} missing values from '{{columnName}}' before computing {{method}}.
message.pt: Removendo {{nullCount}} valores ausentes de '{{columnName}}' antes de calcular {{method}}.

rules.condition: categorical column nullCount > 0 AND method in [frequency, mode, pivot, groupby]

message.en: Treating {{nullCount}} missing values in '{{columnName}}' as a '(missing)' category.
message.pt: Tratando {{nullCount}} valores ausentes em '{{columnName}}' como categoria '(missing)'.

rules.condition: method == correlation AND any column pair has < minPairwiseObs

message.en: Insufficient pairwise observations (< 3) between '{{colA}}' and '{{colB}}' for correlation.
message.pt: Observacoes pareadas insuficientes (< 3) entre '{{colA}}' e '{{colB}}' para correlacao.

rules.condition: method in [timeseries_forecast, moving_average, trend_decomposition] AND datetime column has gaps

message.en: Detected {{gapCount}} time gaps. Interpolating up to {{maxConsecutiveGaps}} consecutive missing points.
message.pt: Detectadas {{gapCount}} lacunas temporais. Interpolando ate {{maxConsecutiveGaps}} pontos consecutivos ausentes.

rules.condition: method in [linear_regression, polynomial_regression] AND any predictor column has nullCount > 0

message.en: Dropping {{droppedRowCount}} rows with missing predictor values before regression. Remaining rows: {{remainingRowCount}}.
message.pt: Removendo {{droppedRowCount}} linhas com valores preditores ausentes antes da regressao. Linhas restantes: {{remainingRowCount}}.

rowCountValidation.description: Rules validating row counts at input and output stages to ensure data integrity and memory safety.

rules.description: Minimum row count required per calculation method family.

message.en: Method '{{method}}' requires at least {{minRows}} rows but got {{actualRows}}.
message.pt: O metodo '{{method}}' requer pelo menos {{minRows}} linhas, mas recebeu {{actualRows}}.

rules.description: Maximum row count to prevent memory exhaustion in the sandbox.

softMessage.en: Large dataset ({{rowCount}} rows). Computation may be slow.
softMessage.pt: Conjunto de dados grande ({{rowCount}} linhas). O calculo pode ser lento.

hardMessage.en: Dataset exceeds maximum of 1,000,000 rows. Please reduce the range.
hardMessage.pt: O conjunto de dados excede o maximo de 1.000.000 linhas. Reduza o intervalo.

rules.description: Validates that output row count matches expected count based on operation type.

message.en: Row count mismatch: expected {{expectedRule}} but output has {{outputRows}} rows (input had {{inputRows}}).
message.pt: Divergencia na contagem de linhas: esperado {{expectedRule}} mas a saida tem {{outputRows}} linhas (entrada tinha {{inputRows}}).

rules.description: Detects when a computation produces zero output rows.

message.en: Computation produced an empty result (0 rows). This may indicate overly restrictive filters or no matching data.
message.pt: O calculo produziu um resultado vazio (0 linhas). Isso pode indicar filtros muito restritivos ou ausencia de dados correspondentes.

rules.description: Warns when statistical methods receive only a single data row.

message.en: Only 1 data row provided. Statistical results may be undefined or unreliable for '{{method}}'.
message.pt: Apenas 1 linha de dados fornecida. Resultados estatisticos podem ser indefinidos ou pouco confiaveis para '{{method}}'.

rules.description: Warns when a high percentage of rows are exact duplicates.

message.en: {{duplicatePercentage}}% of rows are exact duplicates. Verify this is intentional.
message.pt: {{duplicatePercentage}}% das linhas sao duplicatas exatas. Verifique se isso e intencional.

rules.description: Checks that sample size is adequate for the confidence level requested.

message.en: Sample size ({{rowCount}}) may be too small for {{confidenceLevel}} confidence level. Recommended minimum: {{recommendedMin}}.
message.pt: O tamanho da amostra ({{rowCount}}) pode ser muito pequeno para o nivel de confianca {{confidenceLevel}}. Minimo recomendado: {{recommendedMin}}.

reproducibilityAudit.description: Rules ensuring every computation is deterministic and reproducible given the same inputs and environment.

rules.description: All stochastic operations must use an explicit random seed.

message.en: Random seed set to {{seed}} for reproducibility.
message.pt: Semente aleatoria definida como {{seed}} para reprodutibilidade.

rules.description: All floating-point results must be rounded to a configurable number of decimal places.

message.en: Rounding all floats to {{decimals}} decimal places.
message.pt: Arredondando todos os floats para {{decimals}} casas decimais.

rules.description: Output must be sorted deterministically before hashing and return.
Re-run the computation a second time and compare result hashes to confirm determinism.

message.en: Determinism check failed: hash mismatch between run 1 ({{hash1}}) and run 2 ({{hash2}}).
message.pt: Verificacao de determinismo falhou: hashes divergentes entre execucao 1 ({{hash1}}) e execucao 2 ({{hash2}}).

rules.description: Record and optionally enforce pinned versions of computational libraries.

message.en: Package version mismatch: {{package}} is {{actual}} but policy expects {{expected}}.
message.pt: Versao de pacote divergente: {{package}} e {{actual}} mas a politica espera {{expected}}.

rules.description: Capture the full execution environment for audit replay.
Canonicalize input data before hashing to ensure consistent hash computation.
Disable or control multi-threading that could cause non-deterministic results.

message.en: Multi-threading disabled for deterministic computation.
message.pt: Multi-threading desabilitado para calculo deterministico.

rules.description: Ensure dict/set iteration order is stable by using ordered structures.

outputFormatPolicy.description: Rules governing the formatting of numerical and categorical values in computation output.

rules.description: Default number of significant digits for general numeric output.
Switch to scientific notation for numbers beyond these thresholds.
How to display percentage values in output.
How to display currency values when detected or requested.
Standard output format for datetime values.
How to represent null/NaN values in formatted output.
How to represent positive and negative infinity in output.

message.en: Output contains infinity values. Check for division by zero.
message.pt: A saida contem valores infinitos. Verifique divisao por zero.

rules.description: How to represent NaN values distinctly from null.

message.en: Output contains NaN values from undefined operations (e.g., 0/0).
message.pt: A saida contem valores NaN de operacoes indefinidas (ex., 0/0).

rules.description: How to display boolean values in output.
Formatting for integers with many digits.

comparisonTolerance.description: Tolerance thresholds for comparing computation results, used in verification and regression tests.

rules.description: Absolute tolerance for general floating-point comparison.
Tolerance for comparing percentage values.
Tolerance for comparing p-values and statistical significance thresholds.
rules.note: High precision needed because p-values near significance boundaries (e.g., 0.05) require exact comparison.

rules.description: Relative tolerance for very large numeric values where absolute differences may be misleading.
Tolerance for currency values — must be exact to the cent.
Integer values must match exactly with zero tolerance.
Tolerance for comparing correlation coefficients bounded in [-1, 1].
Tolerance for comparing chi-square and F-statistics.

auditTrail.description: Defines the required audit trail fields that must be recorded for every computation for compliance and debugging.

requiredFields.description: Serialized snapshot of the input data (first 100 rows if large), including dtypes and shape.
Ordered list of data transformations applied before computation.
All warnings generated during computation, including policy rule IDs.
Total number of verification rules evaluated during this computation.
Number of verification rules that passed.
Number of verification rules that failed.
Number of rules skipped (not applicable to this computation type).
Details for each rule that failed verification.
Any user-provided overrides to default policy (e.g., proceeding despite warnings).
Snapshot of the runtime environment for reproducibility.
Timing breakdown of the computation phases.
Provenance information linking this computation to its source data.

verificationChecklist.description: Ordered checklist of verification steps the agent must complete for every computation. Steps execute in sequence; a FAIL at any blocking step halts execution.

steps.name: validateInputTypes
steps.description: Verify all input columns have recognized dtypes and no unsupported types are present.

steps.name: checkMissingData
steps.description: Apply missingDataPolicy rules to identify and handle null/NaN/empty values.

steps.name: verifyMinSampleSize
steps.description: Check that row count meets the minimum required by the selected method family.

steps.name: checkMaxRows
steps.description: Ensure row count does not exceed memory-safety hard limit.

steps.name: canonicalizeInput
steps.description: Apply input canonicalization (whitespace, line endings, dtypes) and compute input hash.

steps.name: setDeterminismControls
steps.description: Set random seeds, disable multi-threading, and configure deterministic environment.

steps.name: executeComputation
steps.description: Run the selected calculation recipe on the prepared data.

steps.name: validateOutputRange
steps.description: Check output values are within expected mathematical bounds (e.g., correlation in [-1,1], probabilities in [0,1]).

steps.name: validateRowCounts
steps.description: Apply rowCountValidation rules to verify output row counts match expectations.

steps.name: checkDeterminism
steps.description: Re-run computation and compare result hashes to verify deterministic output.

steps.name: computeHashes
steps.description: Compute SHA-256 hashes of input and output for the result envelope.

steps.name: buildRangeSummary
steps.description: Generate the rangeSummary object with all required summary statistics.

steps.name: enforceFormatting
steps.description: Apply outputFormatPolicy rules to all values in the result.

steps.name: logAuditTrail
steps.description: Record all auditTrail required fields including transformations, warnings, rule results, and environment.

steps.name: assembleEnvelope
steps.description: Construct the final resultEnvelope with all required and optional fields.

steps.name: finalValidation
steps.description: Run a final schema validation on the complete result object to ensure all required fields are present and correctly typed.

steps.name: returnResult
steps.description: Return the verified, formatted, and audited result to the caller.
